## Life Tip of the Week

### Get Inspired!

The tools of this course are *powerful* and *flexible*

To learn more ways to apply them, check out 'Galleries': 

::: .incremental

- The [`R` Graph Gallery](https://r-graph-gallery.com/)
- The [`shiny` Gallery](https://shiny.posit.co/r/gallery/)
- The [`bokeh` Gallery](https://docs.bokeh.org/en/latest/docs/gallery.html) (Python)

:::
